use_cases: Dashboard navigation with collapsible tab states for space efficiency
Category filtering in content platforms with animated tab expansion
Section switching in web applications with smooth transitions
Compact-to-expanded navigation menus in mobile-first interfaces
Tab-based interface for organizing content with interactive feedback
ai_summary: An expandable tabs navigation component featuring smooth spring-based animations that collapse inactive tabs to icon-only states while expanding the active tab to reveal its label. Built with Framer Motion for fluid layout transitions and supports custom icons, colors, and labels. The component provides an elegant way to save screen space while maintaining quick access to navigation items.
